BackgroundGeolocation._comment: Notification copy shown in the persistent foreground-service drawer entry. Visible to the surveyor while a track is being recorded with the screen off.
BackgroundGeolocation.notificationTitle: 野外调查 · 轨迹记录中
BackgroundGeolocation.notificationText: 为完成本次样线/样点调查,正在持续记录 GPS 轨迹。点击返回应用,或在应用中点击"结束"即可停止。
